features.name: LT
features.description: Behavior for lighting applications; interacts with Level Control and timers.

features.name: DF
features.description: When OnOff == FALSE, device is in 'dead front' and other clusters may fail Invoke/Write with INVALID_IN_STATE.

features.name: OFFONLY
features.description: Device supports only Off command; On and Toggle are not supported.

action_facts.name: OffReceived
action_facts.description: Server received Off command

action_facts.name: OffAccepted
action_facts.description: Off command processed and state updated

action_facts.name: OnReceived
action_facts.description: Server received On command

action_facts.name: OnNotSupportedOffOnly
action_facts.description: On command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled

action_facts.name: OnAccepted
action_facts.description: On command accepted and OnOff set to TRUE

action_facts.name: ToggleReceived
action_facts.description: Server received Toggle command

action_facts.name: ToggleNotSupportedOffOnly
action_facts.description: Toggle command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled

action_facts.name: ToggleAccepted
action_facts.description: Toggle command accepted and OnOff toggled

action_facts.name: OffWithEffectReceived
action_facts.description: Server received OffWithEffect command

action_facts.name: OffWithEffectAcceptedStoreScene
action_facts.description: OffWithEffect processed, global scene stored and GlobalSceneControl set to FALSE

action_facts.name: OffWithEffectAcceptedNoStoreScene
action_facts.description: OffWithEffect processed without storing global scene (GlobalSceneControl was FALSE)

action_facts.name: OnWithRecallGlobalSceneReceived
action_facts.description: Server received OnWithRecallGlobalScene command

action_facts.name: OnWithRecallGlobalSceneDiscardedGlobalSceneControlTrue
action_facts.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene discarded because GlobalSceneControl was TRUE

action_facts.name: OnWithRecallGlobalSceneAccepted
action_facts.description: OnWithRecallGlobalScene accepted, Scenes cluster recall invoked and GlobalSceneControl set to TRUE

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffReceived
action_facts.description: Server received OnWithTimedOff command

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffDiscardedAcceptOnlyWhenOn
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff discarded because AcceptOnlyWhenOn bit was set and OnOff was FALSE

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffAcceptedTimedOn
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff accepted while OnOff TRUE, entering or staying in Timed On behavior

action_facts.name: OnWithTimedOffAcceptedDelayedOff
action_facts.description: OnWithTimedOff accepted while OnOff FALSE, entering or updating Delayed Off behavior

action_facts.name: TimerTick
action_facts.description: Periodic 0.1s timer tick for OnTime/OffWaitTime processing

action_facts.name: TimerTickTimedOnDecrement
action_facts.description: Timer tick in Timed On state, OnTime decremented

action_facts.name: TimerTickTimedOnExpired
action_facts.description: Timer tick in Timed On state when OnTime reached 0 and transition to off occurred

action_facts.name: TimerTickDelayedOffDecrement
action_facts.description: Timer tick in Delayed Off state, OffWaitTime decremented

action_facts.name: TimerTickDelayedOffExpired
action_facts.description: Timer tick in Delayed Off state when OffWaitTime reached 0 and periodic update terminated

states.name: BaseOff
states.description: Base state with OnOff == FALSE and no active timed-on or delayed-off behavior

states.name: BaseOn
states.description: Base state with OnOff == TRUE and no active timed-on or delayed-off behavior

states.name: TimedOn
states.description: State where OnOff == TRUE and OnTime is being decremented periodically

states.name: DelayedOff
states.description: State where OnOff == FALSE and OffWaitTime is being decremented periodically

transitions.description: Off command turns device off and clears OnTime if supported
Off command while TimedOn forces off and clears timers
On command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled
On command turns device on from BaseOff, clears OffWaitTime if OnTime == 0 (simplified as clear)
On command from DelayedOff turns device on and clears OffWaitTime if OnTime == 0 (simplified as clear)
Idempotent On command while already on
On command during TimedOn keeps device on (timers unchanged)
Toggle command rejected because OffOnly feature is enabled
Toggle command from on to off; clears OnTime if supported
Toggle command from off to on; clears OffWaitTime if OnTime == 0 (simplified as clear)
Toggle during TimedOn turns device off and clears OnTime; OffWaitTime behavior follows timer logic
Toggle from DelayedOff turns device on and clears OffWaitTime if OnTime == 0 (simplified as clear)
OffWithEffect stores global scene then turns device off and clears OnTime
OffWithEffect when GlobalSceneControl FALSE just turns off and clears OnTime
OffWithEffect from TimedOn stores scene, turns off, and clears timers
OffWithEffect from TimedOn without storing scene turns off and clears timers
OffWithEffect while already off performs effect but leaves OnOff FALSE
OnWithRecallGlobalScene discarded when GlobalSceneControl is TRUE
OnWithRecallGlobalScene recalls global scene (sets OnOff) and sets GlobalSceneControl TRUE
OnWithRecallGlobalScene when already on recalls scene and sets GlobalSceneControl TRUE
OnWithTimedOff discarded because AcceptOnlyWhenOn bit set and device is off
OnWithTimedOff while OnOff TRUE enters or updates TimedOn with new OnTime and OffWaitTime
OnWithTimedOff while already in TimedOn updates timers
OnWithTimedOff while Off and not guarded enters or updates DelayedOff with new OffWaitTime
OnWithTimedOff while already in DelayedOff updates OffWaitTime

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == TRUE and OnTime > 0 and OnTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF
transitions.description: Periodic timer during TimedOn decrements OnTime while still positive

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == TRUE and OnTime == 1 and OnTime != 0xFFFF and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF
transitions.description: When OnTime reaches 0, device turns off and OffWaitTime set to 0

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == FALSE and OffWaitTime > 0 and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF and OnTime != 0xFFFF
transitions.description: Periodic timer during DelayedOff decrements OffWaitTime while still positive

transitions.guard_condition: OnOff == FALSE and OffWaitTime == 1 and OffWaitTime != 0xFFFF and OnTime != 0xFFFF
transitions.description: When OffWaitTime reaches 0, delayed-off behavior terminates
